creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Problem:
Fallout logs are spread out and are located on many package builder servers.
It is important to have them in one place to be able to survey/grep from them.
Having them mailed to maintainers and mailed to the mailing list  https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-pkg-fallout isn't sufficient because both e-mail and mailing list have size limits, and they still don't allow to survey them.

Suggestion:
Please add a single directory accessible through some IPv4 URL like https://fallout.FreeBSD.org where all failed logs will be stored up to 6 months by port category/name. They can be purged after 6 months.

This will be a very useful feature for port committers to analyze and fix failures.
